Guardar CSV
func:
let d = msg.payload;

let header = [
    "t_pc",
    "seq",
    "t_ms",
    "roll",
    "pitch",
    "g_lat",
    "g_lon",
    "yaw_rate",
    "lat",
    "lon",
    "gps_speed_mps",
    "gps_course_deg",
    "gps_sats",
    "gps_hdop",
    "gps_fix",
    "rssi",
    "snr",
    "lost",
    "total"
].join(",") + "\n";

let line = [
    new Date().toISOString(),
    d.seq,
    d.t_ms,
    d.roll,
    d.pitch,
    d.g_lat,
    d.g_lon,
    d.yaw_rate,
    d.lat,
    d.lon,
    d.gps_speed_mps,
    d.gps_course_deg,
    d.gps_sats,
    d.gps_hdop,
    d.gps_fix,
    d.rssi,
    d.snr,
    d.lost,
    d.total
].join(",") + "\n";

if (!context.get("headerWritten")) {
    msg.payload = header + line;
    context.set("headerWritten", true);
} else {
    msg.payload = line;
}

return msg;

name: Data
